calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-21-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Madrina Taylor.
Dept: 514. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR #11918. Telephone: 415-551-0631. Email: tward@sftc.org.

Michael Heath, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CSV Hospitality Management LLC.
Latrice Ramson, Assistant Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Michael Santos, Esq. and Kye Young Lisa Kim, Esq. appeared for defendant Madrina Taylor, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.

Plaintiff's complaint for unlawful detainer was filed on September 19, 2019.
Defendant's answer was filed September 26, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on October 3, 2019, setting trial for today, October 21, 2019.
DOE defendants dismissed today, October 21, 2019.
Defense counsels' oral motion for a continuance is DENIED.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff CSV Hospitality Management LLC, and against defendant Madrina Taylor, as follows:

Judgment is for Possossion only. Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution & Possession of the premises located at 1693 Market Street, #315, San Francisco, CA 94103.

The rental agreement is canceled.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-21-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff CVS Hospitality is present. Represented by Latrice Ransom.
Attorney Howard Olsen
for the plaintiff.
Defendant Madrina Taylor is NOT present.
Attorney Michael Santos for the defendant.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Oct-21-2019 remains on calendar. (501)
